title: Saxicolella submersa
taxonomy: Saxicolella submersa belongs to the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and is a type of marine snail. It is a species of sea snail within the family Calliostomatidae. Further classification includes the superfamily Calliostomatoidea and the order Trochida. This classification suggests that Saxicolella submersa is a member of a group of marine gastropod mollusks. Its classification is a way of categorizing its taxonomic position within the molluscan phylum.
